title: Contribute to workplace health and safety processes
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Contribute to workplace health and safety processes demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Apply workplace health and safety policies and procedures

pcs.text: Access information regarding organisation work health and safety policies and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Access information regarding organisation work health and safety policies and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access information regarding organisation work health and safety policies and procedures.
